title: Vue 2 viewer App.vue fails to compile — @vitejs/plugin-vue2 cannot process TypeScript in script setup blocks
description: Vue 2 viewer (vue/2/viewer) fails with 'Unexpected token, expected ","' because @vitejs/plugin-vue2 has no TypeScript transform for <script setup lang="ts"> blocks. The plugin processes SFC templates but passes the script block through its own Babel-based parser which does not handle TypeScript generics, ref<T>, computed<T>, or type annotations. App.vue was copied from vue/3 viewer and uses Vue 3 Composition API + TypeScript throughout. Stripping generics from the script did not resolve it — the plugin parser fails on any TypeScript syntax in the script block. Fix: add unplugin-vue2-script-setup to vite.config — this provides proper TypeScript + script setup compilation for Vue 2.7 via esbuild. Was broken before tabs-0001 work began.
acceptance: Vue 2 viewer starts without compile errors
All component samples load in vue/2 viewer
